name: Bone Bash Roller Brawl
description: Bone Bash Roller Brawl is the SuperChargers counterpart of Roller Brawl in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Her signature vehicle is the Tomb Buggy. Compared to her normal counterpart, Bone Bash Roller Brawl is much more aggressive and technical in her play style.
biography: Bone Bash Roller Brawl is the SuperChargers counterpart of Roller Brawl in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Now with SuperCharged abilities, Roller Brawl can slash and punch enemies into submission! She can also throw her Fang Blades out at enemies that will eventually return to her. When she is holding onto her Fang Blades, her attacks are slow but powerful; when she is not holding onto them, her attacks are light but quick.
personality: Bone Bash Roller Brawl is much more aggressive and technical in her play style than her previous incarnation. She is described as the star of the show who can bewilder enemies with magnificent performances.

story.content: Bone Bash Roller Brawl is the SuperChargers counterpart of Roller Brawl in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Her signature vehicle is the Tomb Buggy. Now with SuperCharged abilities, Roller Brawl can slash and punch enemies into submission! She can also throw her Fang Blades out at enemies that will eventually return to her. When she is holding onto her Fang Blades, her attacks are slow but powerful; when she is not holding onto them, her attacks are light but quick.

content: "Time to get a move on!" - when entering a vehicle
"You got rolled!" - when exiting a vehicle
"Just what I needed!" - when leveling up
"Yep. You kinda skated over the details the last time we talked about secret ninja commando stuff."
"Hey, blocking and jamming are just as easy in my Tomb Buggy as they are on skates. No problem."
"Crotchety old secret ninja commando trainer, check."
"Thank you Buzz, but I'm just keeping my head in the game."

trivia: Bone Bash Roller Brawl is the only Skylander that was brought back in Superchargers that did not have a series 3 (or any repose, for that matter) for their original character.
She is the only SuperCharger Skylander to originate from Swap Force.
Her jumping attack has a similar animation and movement to the Screw Attack ability from the Metroid series, and to the Spin Attack from the Sonic series.
Unlike her Series 1 counterpart, Bone Bash Roller Brawl has eyebrows.
Also unlike her Series 1 counterpart, Bone Bash Roller Brawl is sleeveless.
While using 'Love Bites', a kissing sound can be heard.
She's the only female Skylander to own a land vehicle.

One of her quotes, 'Head over Heels', refers to someone being madly in love with someone else. This may refer to her backstory involving Kaos, where he falls in love with her and kidnaps her brothers.

When she, Big Bubble Pop Fizz, Super Shot Stealth Elf and Deep Dive Gill Grunt are placed on the portal, they say their official catchphrases in a slightly different tone of their voices. This also applies to most of their quotes, which have been completely re-recorded.

trailers.name: Skylanders SuperChargers - Bone Bash Roller Brawl's Soul Gem Preview (Let's Roll)

gameplay: Compared to her normal counterpart, Bone Bash Roller Brawl is much more aggressive and technical in her play style. Now with SuperCharged abilities, Roller Brawl can slash and punch enemies into submission! She can also throw her Fang Blades out at enemies that will eventually return to her. When she is holding onto her Fang Blades, her attacks are slow but powerful; when she is not holding onto them, her attacks are light but quick. She can also skate forward a short distance and ram into her opponents, and even blow a kiss that saps health from enemies.

basic.name: Derby Duke
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to slash nearby enemies with your Fang Blades.

basic.name: Fangerang
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to extend your Fang Blades and throw them out at enemies. Press Attack 1 while Fang Blades are out to attack with your fists!

basic_upgrades.name: Love Bites
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 2 while Fangerangs are thrown to blow a fangy Vampire Kiss at enemies. Enemies hit by the kiss will be weakened and have some of their health drained.

basic_upgrades.name: Skaters Gonna Skate
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to skate faster and extend your Fang Blades while doing so which damages enemies that get in your way!

basic_upgrades.name: Derby Damage
basic_upgrades.content: Derby Duke attacks now do more damage. All is fair in Derby!

basic_upgrades.name: Crossover Technique
basic_upgrades.content: Fangerangs seek out other targets after the first before returning.

soulgems.name: Brawling Bout!
soulgems.content: Roller Brawl's rage grows over time. When she is at maximum rage, hold Attack 2 unleash her fury on nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Jam-Time
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 while skating to launch yourself like a missile damaging any enemy in the way.

abilities.name: Serious Substitution
abilities.content: Fang Blades become more powerful and will do more damage to enemies.

abilities.name: Always Wear a Helmet
abilities.content: Hold Attack 1 to do an explosive headbutt. That's using your head!

abilities.name: Eat Pavement
abilities.content: Hold Attack 3 to tear up the pavement and damage all enemies in front of you.

abilities.name: Blocker Boutfit
abilities.content: Your Armor bulks up and reduces enemy damage.

abilities.name: Contagious Kiss
abilities.content: When Love Bites connects, it will explode in smaller Vampire Kisses that can bite, weaken and drain surrounding enemies.
